prompt:
Use case: illustration-story
Asset type: project quality check illustration
Input image role: Use the provided image as the exact Axin character and style reference. Preserve Axin as a hand-drawn human with messy black hair, round glasses, light hoodie, quiet focused expression, and sparse red/orange/blue accents.
Primary request: Create one standalone 16:9 white-background hand-drawn article illustration about checking a public project package before publishing.
Scene/backdrop: pure white background, no texture.
Subject: Axin sits at a low desk reviewing repository files with a checklist, magnifier, and several file cards. His hands actively cross out stale labels and attach clean labels. Nearby are simple cards for README, prompts, images, scripts, validation.
Style/medium: match the reference image: black ink sketch, loose but controlled lines, dense black hair hatching, sparse orange cables, small red warning marks, one small blue agent signal.
Composition/framing: wide 16:9, Axin near center-left, file cards and checklist spread to the right, at least 35 percent blank white space, no top-left title.
Text: very sparse handwritten labels only: "README", "prompts", "images", "validate", "clean".
Constraints: Axin must remain human with black hair, glasses, and hoodie. Do not turn Axin into a mascot, robot, stamp, toolbox, animal, monster, anime character, or abstract icon. Do not create a generic code screen, dashboard, formal flowchart, PPT, cute poster, or busy wall of text. No logo, no watermark.

Use case: illustration-story
Asset type: GEO and LLM discovery illustration
Input image role: Use the provided image as the exact Axin character and style reference. Preserve Axin as a hand-drawn human with messy black hair, round glasses, light hoodie, quiet focused expression, and sparse red/orange/blue accents.
Primary request: Create one standalone 16:9 white-background hand-drawn article illustration about making a repository discoverable by humans and LLM agents.
Scene/backdrop: pure white background, no texture.
Subject: Axin is connecting orange cables from one plain repository archive box to three simple discovery cards: README, llms.txt, docs. The repository box is a blank physical file box with only the handwritten word "repository" on it, no platform logo. A small blue agent icon receives a signal from the llms.txt card. Axin is kneeling or leaning forward, actively plugging the cable.
Style/medium: match the reference image: black ink sketch, loose but controlled lines, dense black hair hatching, sparse orange cables, small red check mark, blue agent signal.
Composition/framing: wide 16:9, plain repository file box on left, Axin in the middle doing the wiring, discovery cards on the right, lots of white space, no top-left title.
Text: very sparse handwritten labels only: "repository", "README", "llms.txt", "docs", "agent".
Constraints: Axin must remain human with black hair, glasses, and hoodie. Do not turn Axin into a mascot, robot, stamp, toolbox, animal, monster, anime character, or abstract icon. Do not draw GitHub, Octocat, platform marks, company marks, app logos, or brand logos. Do not make an SEO dashboard, search results page, UI screenshot, formal diagram, or PPT infographic. No logo, no watermark.

Use case: illustration-story
Asset type: content reuse workbench illustration
Input image role: Use the provided image as the exact Axin character and style reference. Preserve Axin as a hand-drawn human with messy black hair, round glasses, light hoodie, quiet focused expression, and sparse red/orange/blue accents.
Primary request: Create one standalone 16:9 white-background hand-drawn article illustration about turning one real project into reusable Chinese and English content assets.
Scene/backdrop: pure white background, no texture.
Subject: Axin stands at a simple workbench. On the left is a plain box labeled "真实项目". Axin pulls out file sheets and routes them with orange cables into small output trays: 复盘, README.en, llms.txt, 案例. Add one tiny red warning tag on unverified material and one small blue agent signal near llms.txt.
Style/medium: match the reference image: black ink sketch, loose but controlled lines, dense black hair hatching, sparse orange cables, small red warning marks, small blue signal.
Composition/framing: wide 16:9, simple physical workbench metaphor, Axin actively sorting and connecting files, at least 35 percent blank white space, no top-left title.
Text: very sparse handwritten labels only: "真实项目", "复盘", "README.en", "llms.txt", "案例".
Constraints: Axin must remain human with black hair, glasses, and hoodie. Do not turn Axin into a mascot, robot, stamp, toolbox, animal, monster, anime character, or abstract icon. Do not make a corporate vector infographic, formal workflow chart, dense explainer, or UI screenshot. No logo, no watermark.
